# Emergency Pressure Relief Function Verification Testing: Validating Pressure Relief Valve and Emergency Exhaust Activation

## 适用受众
Commissioning_Engineer

## 写作角度说明
紧急泄压功能验证测试是调试工程师确认生物安全设备在超压情况下的安全保护功能是否正常的关键测试。紧急泄压装置是防止容器和洁净区过压的最后一道防线，必须通过实际触发测试验证其动作准确性。

## 核心论点 / 洞察
Testing the pressure relief valve at system operating pressure — rather than at its certified setpoint — does not validate that the valve will actually open at the overpressure condition it is designed to protect against.

## 参考素材
- Pressure relief valve (PRV) specification: setpoint typically 250-500 Pa above normal operating pressure for BSL-3 containment zones, certified crack pressure per manufacturer data sheet
- Test procedure: use calibrated pressure source → slowly increase pressure until PRV lifts → record lift pressure → compare to certified setpoint (acceptance: within ±10% of setpoint) → reseat valve and verify no weeping
- Emergency exhaust activation: setpoint typically 100-200 Pa above normal negative pressure setpoint → simulate overpressure by blocking exhaust → verify emergency exhaust fan activates → verify BMS alarm triggers → record activation pressure and response time
- Functional test at each door: test PRV or emergency seal release at each door location → verify all units actuate within 5 seconds of trigger
- Documentation: test data per valve serial number, test equipment calibration references, as-found and as-left data, signed by commissioning engineer

## 关键词
Emergency Relief, Pressure Relief Valve, Overpressure Test, Safety Interlock, Emergency Exhaust, PRV Testing
